faqs.question: What deal options are available for 105F Yoga's Hot Yoga: One Class or 3 Weeks of Unlimited Classes?
faqs.answer: 105F Yoga offers two options: a single class with mat and towel rental included, or 3 weeks of unlimited classes. The single-class option comes with equipment rentals bundled in, making it convenient for first-time visitors.

faqs.question: Does the 1 Class option at 105F Yoga include mat and towel rental?
faqs.answer: Yes, the single-class option explicitly includes mat and towel rental. This means participants do not need to bring their own equipment for that session.

faqs.question: Which Chicago, IL locations can I use for the Hot Yoga: One Class or 3 Weeks of Unlimited Classes deal?
faqs.answer: The deal is redeemable at four 105F Yoga locations across Chicago, IL: Chicago Loop (47 West Polk Street), West Town (1344 North Milwaukee Avenue), Lincoln Park (2736A North Clark Street), and Andersonville (5715 North Clark Street). Customers have confirmed that the pass is valid across all locations.

faqs.question: What type of fitness classes does 105F Yoga offer through this deal?
faqs.answer: 105F Yoga offers hot yoga classes through this deal, which falls under the fitness class and yoga class category. The 3 Weeks of Unlimited Classes option allows participants to attend as many hot yoga sessions as they choose during that period.

faqs.question: Which 105F Yoga location is best suited for someone in the Lincoln Park or Andersonville neighborhood of Chicago?
faqs.answer: 105F Yoga has a Lincoln Park location at 2736A North Clark Street and an Andersonville location at 5715 North Clark Street, both in Chicago, IL. Since the deal is valid at all locations, participants from either neighborhood can choose the most convenient studio.

images.quality_assessment: 40 total images provided with generic alt_texts that mostly repeat the title (e.g., 'Hot Yoga: One Class w/ Mat and Towel Rental Included or 3 Weeks of Unlimited Classes at 105F Yoga (Up to 29% Off) - Image 2'). While quantity is strong, alt_text descriptiveness is weak with minimal variation or specific content descriptions. Includes some relevant imagery like 'Redemption locations map' and 'Yoga Tips' but many alt_texts are repetitive or reference unrelated yoga deals.
